title: Student Management System
description: A secure Java & MySQL console app featuring layered architecture, input-validated CRUD, and analytical SQL reporting.

title: SpringMart
description: A full-stack e-commerce demo linking a Spring Boot REST API to an AI-crafted React UI, featuring database-backed search, pagination, and Docker deployment.

title: wrkout
description: A premium, haptic-enabled workout tracker optimized for Push/Pull/Legs (PPL) splits. Built with Next.js and Supabase, it features seamless SPA navigation, sensory feedback, and real-time progress tracking.

title: Shreyan's Arc
description: An interactive, infinite-canvas DSA roadmap with Firebase cloud sync that cuts through the noise of massive question banks. Designed to guide you through core problem-solving patterns, track progress, and streamline interview prep.

title: J-Void
description: A minimalist Java playground for distraction-free DSA practice. Integrates with the "Shreyan's Arc" roadmap and provides direct LeetCode links for quick submissions.

title: WealthWise
description: A Next.js web application built for a financial advisor to showcase services, featuring interactive calculators (SIP, Retirement, and more) and resources to boost client outreach.
